retrieved_result: What does an emergency room (ER) nurse do? Los Robles Hospital & Medical Center Administration Registered nurses in emergency departments are trained on multiple different areas and are experienced nurses. In this video, Lynn Tadlock, RN, of Los Robles Hospital & Medical Center, explains the training and certifications that are required. Con
